notes: A completely refreshed look — the calm, ocean-inspired 'Swell' redesign.
Every download now shows its stage at a glance: Downloading, Merging, Converting, Ready.
Settings moved into a slide-over panel that stays out of your way.
New app icon and launch screen.
Includes all 3.8.x capabilities: hardware-accelerated conversions, parallel downloads, self-updating engine, and YouTube live-stream support.
